The '''''Death Mark''''' was a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] that used to belong to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] known as [[Vygar]]. Wanting to offer his colleagues a place of their own where they could rest, make repairs and socialize with their colleagues, Vygar decided to integrate his ship into the [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']] [[Space station/Legends|space station]].

Apart from bounty hunters, [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]], [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]-for-hire, and other freelancers also frequented the ''Death Mark''. No longer in the possession of Vygar, the ''Death Mark'' also offered medical services, armory, and communication facilities to licensed bounty hunters. Non-guild hunters and general [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] could also use these facilities, but at a slightly increased price.

The successful protector firm [[Reenogga Personal Services, Cubed]] operated from the ''Death Mark'' where their main office was situated.
